target_skill.name: session-start
target_skill.description: Session onboarding on first message — "work on [project]", "continue [project]". Loads handoff + PLAN. Not "where are we" (→ chat-status) or archiving (→ chat-archive).

competing_skills.name: chat-status
competing_skills.description: Mid-session checkpoint — "where are we", "status update", "what's next", summaries, topic shifts. Use proactively. Not session start (→ session-start) or close (→ chat-archive).

competing_skills.name: chat-archive
competing_skills.description: Trigger at session end — "archive this", "wrap up", "we're done", "start a new chat", or natural stopping points (budget low, milestone hit). Fires even mid-build; do not casually summarize instead.

competing_skills.name: build
competing_skills.description: Write working code — "build this", "prototype this", "MVP this", "make it real". Not for planning (→ architect), bugs (→ systematic-debug), or deploy (→ ship-it).

competing_skills.name: idea-scout
competing_skills.description: Evaluate a raw idea with scoring — "scout this", "what if we built", "is this viable". Auto-fires on new ideas in fresh chats. Not for building (→ architect) or saving without eval (→ idea-vault).

positive_cases: Let's work on Listing Lens v7 today
Continue the grove-mobile project from yesterday
Pick up where we left off on baylee-skills
Work on the auth rewrite — pull the handoff
negative_cases: Where are we on the rebuild right now? (expect chat-status)
Wrap this chat up, we're done for the day (expect chat-archive)
Build me a tip-splitting React artifact with touch buttons (expect build)
Scout this idea: a Slack bot that summarizes new Grove tasks (expect idea-scout)
Quick status update on the Build Pipeline family (expect chat-status)
